g.data-semantic-speech-none: x equals the fraction with numerator negative b plus or minus the square root of b squared minus the fraction with numerator negative b plus or minus the square root of b squared minus 4 a c and denominator 2 a and denominator 2 a
g.data-semantic-speech: <mark name="0"/> <say-as interpret-as="character">x</say-as> <mark name="1"/> equals <break time="250ms"/> <mark name="39"/> the <mark name="34"/> fraction with numerator <mark name="2"/> negative <mark name="3"/> <say-as interpret-as="character">b</say-as> <mark name="4"/> plus or minus <mark name="32"/> the square root of <mark name="5"/> <say-as interpret-as="character">b</say-as> <mark name="6"/> squared <mark name="8"/> minus <break time="250ms"/> <mark name="30"/> the <mark name="25"/> fraction with numerator <mark name="9"/> negative <mark name="10"/> <say-as interpret-as="character">b</say-as> <mark name="11"/> plus or minus <mark name="23"/> the square root of <mark name="12"/> <say-as interpret-as="character">b</say-as> <mark name="13"/> squared <mark name="15"/> minus <prosody rate="+25%"> <mark name="16"/> 4 <mark name="17"/> <say-as interpret-as="character">a</say-as> <mark name="18"/> <say-as interpret-as="character">c</say-as> </prosody> <break time="250ms"/> <mark name="29"/> and denominator <prosody rate="+25%"> <mark name="26"/> 2 <mark name="27"/> <say-as interpret-as="character">a</say-as> </prosody> <break time="250ms"/> <mark name="38"/> and denominator <prosody rate="+25%"> <mark name="35"/> 2 <mark name="36"/> <say-as interpret-as="character">a</say-as> </prosody>
